detectors.description:
Reentrancy in ToTheMoon._transfer(address,address,uint256) (ToTheMoon.sol#665-789):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (ToTheMoon.sol#729)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (ToTheMoon.sol#803-815)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (ToTheMoon.sol#735)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (ToTheMoon.sol#823)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (ToTheMoon.sol#787)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (ToTheMoon.sol#949)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (ToTheMoon.sol#929)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (ToTheMoon.sol#931)
	ToTheMoon._rOwned (ToTheMoon.sol#335) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- ToTheMoon._takeTeam(uint256) (ToTheMoon.sol#943-951)
	- ToTheMoon._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (ToTheMoon.sol#903-939)
	- ToTheMoon.balanceOf(address) (ToTheMoon.sol#491-495)
	- ToTheMoon.constructor() (ToTheMoon.sol#425-455)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (ToTheMoon.sol#787)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (ToTheMoon.sol#957)
	ToTheMoon._rTotal (ToTheMoon.sol#349) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- ToTheMoon._getCurrentSupply() (ToTheMoon.sol#1099-1109)
	- ToTheMoon._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (ToTheMoon.sol#955-961)
	- ToTheMoon.constructor() (ToTheMoon.sol#425-455)
	- ToTheMoon.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (ToTheMoon.sol#587-609)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [ToTheMoon._transfer(address,address,uint256)](ToTheMoon.sol#L665-L789):

		- [uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp)](ToTheMoon.sol#L803-L815)
	External calls sending eth:
	- [sendETHToFee(address(this).balance)](ToTheMoon.sol#L735)
		- [_marketingAddress.transfer(amount)](ToTheMoon.sol#L823)
	State variables written after the call(s):

		- [_rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam)](ToTheMoon.sol#L949)
		- [_rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount)](ToTheMoon.sol#L929)
		- [_rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount)](ToTheMoon.sol#L931)
	[ToTheMoon._rOwned](ToTheMoon.sol#L335) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [ToTheMoon._takeTeam(uint256)](ToTheMoon.sol#L943-L951)
	- [ToTheMoon._transferStandard(address,address,uint256)](ToTheMoon.sol#L903-L939)
	- [ToTheMoon.balanceOf(address)](ToTheMoon.sol#L491-L495)
	- [ToTheMoon.constructor()](ToTheMoon.sol#L425-L455)
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](ToTheMoon.sol#L787)
		- [_rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee)](ToTheMoon.sol#L957)
	[ToTheMoon._rTotal](ToTheMoon.sol#L349) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [ToTheMoon._getCurrentSupply()](ToTheMoon.sol#L1099-L1109)
	- [ToTheMoon._reflectFee(uint256,uint256)](ToTheMoon.sol#L955-L961)
	- [ToTheMoon.constructor()](ToTheMoon.sol#L425-L455)
	- [ToTheMoon.tokenFromReflection(uint256)](ToTheMoon.sol#L587-L609)
